posts.author: david.lowe (David Lowe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Lovin the Checklist for Monday. I would like to see an improvement to add a consolidated or centralised board the shows all checklist items across multiple boards/workspaces? Ideally this would be a two-way comms interaction to keep the items in sync.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to see/show a consolidated list of all Checklist items across multiple boards and/or workspaces. This would ensure complete management of checklist items across multiple spaces and greater ability for better automate/workflow/report progress, assignment notification and user workload management.
